long_description:
[Acadia-SRE]-Storage volume action error failed percent [US-SOUTH-STAGE] is Triggered

TIP Runbook URL:                    https://github.ibm.com/storage-sre-and-operations/SOP/blob/main/control_plane/sysdig_alerts/storage_volume_action_error_failed.md
TIP Situation:                      Observed service-error-storage_volume_error_failed_percent issue in Acadia-Genctl
TIP Short Description:              Storage volume action error failed percent
TIP Console:                        toc
TIP Self Healing:                   false
TIP Self Healing Timeout Seconds:   3600
TIP CRN:                            crn:v1:staging:public:is-volume-acadia:us-south::mzone716:microservice: 

Event Generated:

Severity:            sev-3
Metric:
    sum by(kube_cluster_name, controller) (rate(acadia_storage_volume_action_count{result=~"error_failed"}[10m])) / sum by(kube_cluster_name, controller) (rate(acadia_storage_volume_action_count{result=~"error_failed|completed"}[10m])) * 100 > 5 = 100.00
Segment:
    controller = 'encryption' and kube_cluster_name = 'mzone716'

Time:                12/04/2025 08:10 AM UTC
State:               Triggered

------

Triggered by Alert:

Type:           Prometheus
Name:           [Acadia-SRE]-Storage volume action error failed percent [US-SOUTH-STAGE]
Description:    Storage volume action error failed percent
Team:           is-volume-acadia
Scope:          
Alert When:     sum by(kube_cluster_name, controller) (rate(acadia_storage_volume_action_count{result=~"error_failed"}[10m])) / sum by(kube_cluster_name, controller) (rate(acadia_storage_volume_action_count{result=~"error_failed|completed"}[10m])) * 100 > 5
Duration:       10m
